revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:近津尾神社]]
{{Infobox religious building| religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |name = Chikatsuo Shrine |location = Kokubu 2-chome, Ōtsu City, Shiga Prefecture, 442 |ISO = JP |coordinates = {{coord|34|57|57.9|N|135|53|23.8|E|region:JP-25_type:landmark|display=inline,title|qq=}} |deity = {{ill|Emperor Ōjin|qid=Q317997|lt=Hondawake-no-Mikoto|ja|誉田別尊|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Ōjin|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 応神天皇|1=Emperor Ōjin|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q317997}} |Rank = Not specified<ref>Shiga Prefecture Municipal History Compilation Committee, ''History of Shiga Prefecture Municipal Development,'' Shōwa 42.</ref> |consecration_year = {{ill|Jōan (Japan)|ja|承安|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jōan (Japan)|1=Shōan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11076350}} 3 (1173) |Main Hall = {{ill|Nagare-zukuri|en|Nagare-zukuri|qid=Q210684|lt=Nagare-zukuri|1=Nagare-zukuri}} (Single-Bay Style) |Alias = |Pilgrimage Sites = |festival = May 5 | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |image = [[File:Chikatsuo-jinja.jpg|250px|Chikatsuo Shrine]] |Map = {{location map|Japan Shiga|lat_deg=34|lat_min=57|lat_sec=57.9|lon_deg=135|lon_min=53|lon_sec=23.8|label=Chikatsuo Shrine|position=center|width=200|qq=}} }} '''Chikatsuo Shrine''' (近津尾神社) is a {{ill|Shinto shrine|en|Shinto shrine|qid=Q845945|lt=Shinto shrine|1=Shinto shrine}} located in Kokubu, Ōtsu City, Shiga Prefecture. == deity == * {{ill|Emperor Ōjin|qid=Q317997|lt=Hondawake-no-Mikoto|ja|誉田別尊|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Ōjin|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 応神天皇|1=Emperor Ōjin|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q317997}} == History == According to the ''Records of Ishiyama Temple'' (''Ishiyama-dera Kiroku''), Volume 3, Chikatsuo Shrine was established in {{ill|Jōan (Japan)|ja|承安|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jōan (Japan)|1=Shōan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11076350}} 3 (1173) by the temple's abbot, {{ill|Kuyū Sōzu|ja|公祐僧都|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kuyū Sōzu|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, as a {{ill|Chinjusha|en|Chinjusha|qid=Q13479654|lt=Chinjusha|1=Chinjusha}} (guardian shrine) for {{ill|Ishiyama-dera|en|Ishiyama-dera|qid=Q1082791|lt=Ishiyama-dera|1=Ishiyama-dera}}. During the {{ill|Genroku|en|Genroku|qid=Q1325001|lt=Genroku era|1=Genroku}} (late 17th to early 18th century), the renowned haiku poet {{ill|Matsuo Bashō|en|Matsuo Bashō|qid=Q5676|lt=Matsuo Bashō|1=Matsuo Bashō}} lived within the shrine grounds, establishing the {{ill|Genju-an|ja|幻住庵|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Genju-an|1=Genjū-an|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11484130}} hermitage. The hermitage was rebuilt in 1940 (Shōwa 15) and again renovated in 1991 as part of the "Bashō’s Hometown Poetic Journey Project."<ref>{{Cite web|url=https://www.city.otsu.lg.jp/soshiki/025/1604/g/shisetsu/1389882417027.html|title=Genju-an (Ōtsu City)|access-date=2023-12-03|publisher=Ōtsu City|archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20220522115104/https://www.city.otsu.lg.jp/soshiki/025/1604/g/shisetsu/1389882417027.html|archive-date=2022-05-22|qq=}}</ref> == Shrine Crest == * {{ill|Mitsu Tomoe|ja|左三つ巴|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mitsu Tomoe|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 巴|1=Tomoe|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q1557435}} (Left Triple-Tomoe) == festival == * {{ill|Reisai|ja|例祭|fr|Reisai|fr|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Reisai|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to フェスティバル}}: May 5 == Auxiliary Shrines == [[File:Chikatsuo-jinja, keidaisha.jpg|thumb|Auxiliary shrines]] * Yama no Kami Shrine * Hō Shrine * Ametsubo Shrine == Access == ; Public Transportation * From {{ill|Ishiyama Station|en|Ishiyama Station|qid=Q740087|lt=Ishiyama Station|1=Ishiyama Station}} on the {{ill|Biwako Line|en|Biwako Line|qid=Q804135|lt=Biwako Line|1=Biwako Line}} ({{ill|Tōkaidō Main Line|en|Tōkaidō Main Line|qid=Q1190152|lt=Tōkaidō Main Line|1=Tōkaidō Main Line}}) or {{ill|Keihan Ishiyama Sakamoto Line|en|Keihan Ishiyama Sakamoto Line|qid=Q6383610|lt=Keihan Ishiyama Sakamoto Line|1=Keihan Ishiyama Sakamoto Line}}, take the {{ill|Keihan Bus|en|Keihan Bus|qid=Q11375813|lt=Keihan Bus|1=Keihan Bus}} (bound for Kokubu housing complex) to the "Genju-an" bus stop, then walk approximately 4 minutes.<ref>{{Cite web|url=https://www.navitime.co.jp/poi?spot=02037-0026613|title=Chikatsuo Shrine Map and Access Information|access-date=2023-12-03|publisher=NAVITIME Japan|qq=}}</ref> ; By Car * Approximately 5 minutes from the {{ill|Keiji Bypass|en|Keiji Bypass|qid=Q11374559|lt=Keiji Bypass|1=Keiji Bypass}} {{ill|Ishiyama Interchange|ja|石山インターチェンジ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ishiyama Interchange|1=Ishiyama interchange|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11585514}}. The parking lot is shared with {{ill|Genju-an|ja|幻住庵|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Genju-an|1=Genjū-an|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11484130}}. == References == {{Reflist|qq=}} {{Footnotes Help|qq=}}
== See Also == * {{ill|Genju-an|ja|幻住庵|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Genju-an|1=Genjū-an|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11484130}} == External Links == {{commonscat|qq=}} * [http://www.shiga-jinjacho.jp/ycBBS/Board.cgi/02_jinja_db/db/ycDB_02jinja-pc-detail.html?mode:view=1&view:oid=80 Chikatsuo Shrine - Shiga Prefecture Shrine Bureau] * [https://yaokami.jp/1250114/ Chikatsuo Shrine - Yaokami] {{Shinto-stub|qq=}}
{{translated page|ja|近津尾神社|version=98297418|comment=Imported full ja history}}
